tests.title: Successful introspection of an active token
tests.given: A valid, non-expired token and authenticated client credentials for the introspection endpoint
tests.when: Introspect is called with the token parameter
tests.then: A POST application/x-www-form-urlencoded request carrying token is sent and a typed response with active=true plus standard metadata (scope, client_id, username, token_type, exp, iat, nbf, sub, aud, iss, jti) is returned; unknown members remain reachable

tests.title: Introspection of an inactive or expired token
tests.given: An expired or revoked token and authenticated client credentials
tests.when: Introspect is called with the token parameter
tests.then: A typed response with active=false is returned and no other member is required to be present

tests.title: Client authentication on the introspection request
tests.when: Introspect is called using client_secret_basic (default) and, separately, client_secret_post
tests.then: With client_secret_basic the request carries an HTTP Basic Authorization header whose username and password are the form-urlencoded client_id and client_secret and no credentials appear in the body; with client_secret_post client_id and client_secret appear as form parameters and no Basic header is set

tests.title: token_type_hint is included in the request
tests.given: A token and a token_type_hint of access_token or refresh_token
tests.when: Introspect is called with the hint configured
tests.then: The hint is sent as the token_type_hint form parameter; the token parameter is always present and the request succeeds regardless of hint correctness

tests.title: Error response from the introspection endpoint
tests.when: Introspect is called and the endpoint replies HTTP 401 with an OAuth error body
tests.then: A typed introspection error carrying error=invalid_client (plus optional error_description, error_uri, and the HTTP status) is surfaced

tests.title: Discovery-based endpoint resolution
tests.given: A valid OIDC Discovery / Authorization Server Metadata document containing introspection_endpoint
tests.when: The introspection endpoint is resolved from discovery and passed to Introspect
tests.then: The introspection_endpoint URL from the discovery document is used rather than requiring manual configuration
